steps.title: Recognize the function structure
steps.content: The function $W(x) = 5x + 75$ is linear, in slope-intercept form $W(x) = mx + b$. The coefficient 5 represents the time per plant watered, and 75 is the constant term-the part of total time that does not depend on the number of plants.

steps.title: Find the constant by evaluating at x = 0
steps.content:
To isolate hedge-trimming time alone, evaluate the function when no plants are watered ($x = 0$):
$$W(0) = 5(0) + 75 = 75$$
Since watering zero plants contributes zero minutes, the entire 75 minutes represents time spent trimming the hedges. The answer is 75 minutes.
